fund_transfer.transfer_type: Internal transfer between ADX Bank accounts only (intra-bank)

otp_verification.process: Initiate transfer → receive OTP → confirm with OTP within 5 minutes

failed_transfers.fund_reversal: If a transfer fails after debit, funds are reversed within 2 hours
failed_transfers.otp_expiry: If OTP expires, the transfer is cancelled and must be re-initiated
failed_transfers.insufficient_funds: Transfer rejected immediately if sender has insufficient balance

restrictions.self_transfer: Transfers to your own account number are not permitted
restrictions.inactive_accounts: Transfers to inactive or blocked accounts are rejected
restrictions.kyc_pending: Customers with PENDING KYC cannot initiate transfers above ₹50,000

transaction_record.retention: All transfer records are retained for 7 years as per RBI guidelines
transaction_record.dispute_window: Disputes must be raised within 30 days of the transaction
